message:
feat(engine): add ES2015 class declaration support (parser + lowering)

Implements the basic class declaration pipeline so `class Foo { ... }`
is parsed, lowered, and executed:

- ast.rs: ClassDeclaration struct with MethodDefinition and MethodKind
  types; Statement::ClassDeclaration variant
- parser.rs: parse_class_declaration() recognizes `class` keyword,
  parses name, extends clause, and body methods (constructor, methods,
  get/set, static)
- lowering_pipeline.rs: ClassDeclaration lowered as DeclareFunction
  using the constructor body; class name bound as a let binding
- static_semantics.rs, parser_arena.rs, parser_multi_engine_harness.rs:
  match arms for new Statement::ClassDeclaration variant

The `new` operator creates objects and calls constructors, but `this`
binding in constructors and prototype method dispatch still need
further implementation for full class semantics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
